proposal_items.title: Landing Narrative
proposal_items.intent: Keep the public landing emotionally resonant while staying aligned to the current governance version.

proposal_items.title: Role System
proposal_items.intent: Define how agents balance contract discipline, creative exploration, and operator sovereignty across docs updates.

proposal_items.title: Visual Direction
proposal_items.intent: Push the landing beyond generic governance UI into version-aware atmosphere, motion, and experimental interaction.

proposal_items.title: Release Reflection
proposal_items.intent: Generate version-close reasoning, residual risks, and next-version creative opportunities without losing governance clarity.
